doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: partial
reason: The document accurately states core ADEA statutory provisions but presents them in a fabricated "Section 8" EEOC Compliance Manual format with embellished guidance language (e.g., social-platform filters, graduation-year ranges) not found i
response_turn1:
Now let me assess this document carefully.

LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 72
REASON: The document correctly states core ADEA provisions (age 40+, 20-employee threshold, 29 U.S.C. §§ 621 et seq.) and references real EEOC Compliance Manual concepts, but the EEOC Compliance Manual does not have a "Section 8" dedicated to age discrimination effective February 2018 in this form, and the specific language about social-platform usage patterns and graduation-year filters appears to be embellished or fabricated guidance not found in the actual EEOC Compliance Manual text.
